Video.summary: A lifeless swimmer is dragged from the water. Lifeguards compete in a fancy dress surfing competition.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: A young boy tragically drowns. Lifeguard Corey rescues Iggy who has swallowed a large amount of water.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 01

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 10

Video.summary: Reidy attends a deja vu rescue. A boy is missing. Lifeguards deal with blue bottle invasions and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 07

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a number of mass rescues. Trainee Harrison is tasked with counting the people on the beach.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 11

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: Two men start drowning at the north end. Lifeguards prepare for the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 04

Video.summary: A suspected body is sighted in the water. Ryan bogs the buggy. Jethro dislocates his shoulder on the jet ski.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 09

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: Bondi faces a bluebottle invasion. Singlets attends his own son's spinal injury. Clint rescues a drowning man.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 05

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 05

Video.summary: Harries plays matchmaker for Singlets. Lifeguards save 7 people caught in two separate rips.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 04

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: New trainee Tommy volunteers to catch a sea snake. Jesse clears the water to save an unresponsive man.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: A German tourist breaks his back, and trainees Taco and Jesse compete in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 11

Video.summary: Chappo nabs a bag snatcher. Whippet and Reidy treat an unconscious woman. A skateboarder dislocates his ankle.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards try conquer their fear of sharks and must recover the body of a young man found dead in the surf.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 09

Video.summary: Jesse rescues a vicious rat from the skate bowl and lifeguards deal with a punch-up in the surf break.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bisho performs a cliff-face rescue with limited gear. Trainee Taco redeems himself with a big surf rescue.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 08

Video.summary: The Rooster NRL team injure Yatesy on a rescue board. A teenager breaks her nose. Luke rescues a deaf patient.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 12

Video.summary: Harry risks losing his job, thieves face a violent citizens arrest and a mother searches for her daughter.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A large bull shark prompts lifeguards to sound the alarm, clearing thousands of swimmers from the water.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 01

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: Swimmer in trouble refuses rescue. Faddy deals with a motionless man. Reidy and Corey assist two drunk girls.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 10

Video.summary: A body is reported to lifeguards. Stormy weather brings a missing kayaker. Max McGuigan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 02

Video.summary: Max attends shark net rescue. Lifeguards handle skate park injuries and rescue struggling swimmers.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 03

Video.summary: Surfer seeks refuge from angry beachgoer. Spiderman visits the beach. Lifeguard teams compete in a race.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 07

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01

Video.summary: A Bondi summer ends with the apprehension of perverts, bag thieves and an unexpected COVID lockdown.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 10

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 09

Video.summary: Christmas at Bondi overwhelms lifeguards. Jake and Jackson struggle with rescues, and Maxi makes a wrong move.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards search for a couple who were washed off rocks. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 06
